summary: Iteration 58: Verified Calibration Stats Panel in INTEL tab. All 11 tests passed. The /api/intel/dashboard endpoint correctly returns calibration object with all 5 required fields: confidenceAccuracy, flipCandidates, edgePerformance, errorMap, and propRecBreakdown.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing settled picks in preview DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 verified calibration stats panel. Key findings: (1) Soccer calibration data: 15 picks, 80% hit rate, 2 confidence bands (mid_55-69: 72.7%, high_70+: 100%), 0 flip candidates, edge performance all UNKNOWN (picks predate calibration engine), 3 errorMap entries (pass_attempts|home, saves|away, pass_attempts|away all over-projecting), 4 propRecBreakdown entries. (2) Basketball calibration data: 11 picks, 54.5% hit rate, 3 confidence bands, 0 flip candidates, edge performance all UNKNOWN, 1 errorMap entry (points|home under-projecting), 2 propRecBreakdown entries. (3) All calibration fields have correct structure and data types. (4) Non-owner access correctly denied.

calibration_object_structure.confidenceAccuracy: Maps confidence bands (high_70+, mid_55-69, low_<55) to actual hit rates with hits, misses, total, rate, label fields
calibration_object_structure.flipCandidates: List of prop+rec combos with < 50% hit rate and 5+ samples, sorted by rate ascending. Empty in preview DB (all combos > 50%)
calibration_object_structure.edgePerformance: Shows STRONG/LEAN/LOW/UNKNOWN performance. All UNKNOWN in preview DB (picks predate calibration engine)
calibration_object_structure.errorMap: Contains avgError, direction (over-projecting/under-projecting), sample counts per prop+venue. Minimum 3 samples required
calibration_object_structure.propRecBreakdown: Full hit rates for every prop+direction combo with hits, misses, total, rate, avgError fields

verified_features.auto_flip_badge_criteria: rate < 45% AND total >= 15 (no candidates meet criteria in preview DB)
